markdown.gemini:
# Mosque of al-Nasir Muhammad at the Citadel (جامع الناصر محمد بالقلعة)
**Status:** PUBLISHED_MEDIA  
**District:** Historic Cairo  
**Type:** Historic Monument / Structure  

## Historical Summary
A significant site (Mosque of al-Nasir Muhammad at the Citadel) representing Cairo's rich urban and architectural heritage.

*منشأة تراثية هامة (جامع الناصر محمد بالقلعة) تعكس الهوية المعمارية والتاريخية للقاهرة.*

## Architectural Details
Constructed using traditional Cairo masonry and spatial layouts typical of its historic era.

### Key Elements
- Stone Masonry
- Historic Entrance Vault

## Stories & Heritage Significance
### Historical Context (السياق التاريخي)
**Classification:** fact
The monument Mosque of al-Nasir Muhammad at the Citadel played an integral role in the urban development of its district.

## Visitor Information
- **Opening Hours:** Unknown — requires official or field verification.
- **Ticket Price:** Unknown — requires official or field verification.
- **Photography Rules:** Unknown — requires official or field verification.
- **Dress Code:** Modest clothing recommended.
- **Accessibility:** Unknown — requires official or field verification.

## Photo Candidates
- **[COVER]** General View of Mosque of al-Nasir Muhammad at the Citadel (CC BY-SA 4.0)
  - Direct Link: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/mosque-al-nasir-muhammad-citadel.jpg
  - Attribution: CC BY-SA 4.0 via Wikimedia Commons

## Sources
- **[SRC-MOSQUEALNASIRMUHAMMADCITADEL]** [Archnet & Ministry Documentation for Mosque of al-Nasir Muhammad at the Citadel](https://archnet.org/sites/mosque-al-nasir-muhammad-citadel) - *Aga Khan Documentation Center / Ministry of Tourism and Antiquities*

## Unresolved Items
No open issues.

# Research note — Mosque of al-Nasir Muhammad (Citadel)

- **Place slug:** `mosque-al-nasir-muhammad-citadel`
- **Asset ID:** `cover-mosque-al-nasir-muhammad-citadel`
- **Role:** cover
- **Local file:** `images/mosque-al-nasir-muhammad-citadel/mosque-al-nasir-muhammad-citadel-cover-citadel-courtyard.jpg`
- **Canonical ImageKit path:** `/places/mosque-al-nasir-muhammad-citadel/cover.jpg`
- **Verification date carried forward:** 2026-07-19

## Why this revised cover was kept or selected

This revised patch keeps or refines a minaret-led or architecturally clearer image choice from the verified pool.

This file uses the verified source image selected specifically for this published record.

## Source and rights

- **Source page:** https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Courtyard_of_Al-Nasir_Muhammad_Mosque_Cairo_Citadel_2019_(1).jpg
- **Direct original image URL:** https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/c/cc/Courtyard_of_Al-Nasir_Muhammad_Mosque_Cairo_Citadel_2019_%281%29.jpg
- **Source title:** Courtyard of Al-Nasir Muhammad Mosque Cairo Citadel 2019 (1).jpg
- **Creator:** Radosław Botev
- **License:** CC BY 3.0 PL
- **License URL:** https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/pl/
- **Required attribution:** Courtyard of Al-Nasir Muhammad Mosque Cairo Citadel 2019 (1).jpg — Radosław Botev, CC BY 3.0 PL, via Wikimedia Commons

## Display copy

- **Alt text (EN):** The courtyard of Al-Nasir Muhammad Mosque at the Cairo Citadel, framed by columns and arcades.
- **Alt text (AR):** فناء مسجد الناصر محمد في قلعة القاهرة تحيط به الأعمدة والأروقة.
- **Caption (EN):** Courtyard of Al-Nasir Muhammad Mosque at the Citadel.
- **Caption (AR):** فناء مسجد الناصر محمد بالقلعة.

## Packaging note

The local filename was renamed to describe its role and subject more clearly.

## Modifications

None
